Elevate Your
Atmosphere
hero.subtitle: Premium live music for weddings, galas, and corporate events in Montréal, Ottawa, Gatineau and beyond.

about.label: About Silantra
about.title:
Where Elegance
Meets Rhythm
about.p1: Silantra Live Music Entertainment is a boutique collective of professional musicians dedicated to transforming events into unforgettable experiences. Rooted in the vibrant cultural corridor of Montréal, Ottawa, and Gatineau, we bring the sophistication of jazz and the energy of pop to every stage we grace.
about.p2: Whether it's the tender first dance at a wedding, the ambient pulse of a corporate cocktail, or the grandeur of a gala, our ensembles are meticulously curated to match the mood of your occasion.
about.v1_desc: Every musician is hand-selected for their artistry, professionalism, and ability to read a room.
about.v2_desc: From classic jazz standards to contemporary pop arrangements tailored to your vision.
about.v3_desc: Fluent in English and French. Based in the National Capital Region. We also travel wherever the music takes us.

ensembles.label: The Ensembles
ensembles.title: Curated Formations
ensembles.subtitle: Each ensemble delivers an unforgettable musical experience, from intimate duos to grand formations of 6 or more.
ensembles.duo_desc: Intimate and refined. Perfect for cocktail hours and private dinners.
ensembles.trio_desc: A balanced blend of warmth and energy. Ideal for receptions and lounges.
ensembles.quartet_desc: Rich, full-bodied sound. A statement piece for galas and ceremonies.
ensembles.quintet_desc: The complete experience. Commanding presence for grand celebrations.
ensembles.grande_desc: A fully orchestrated spectacle. Custom formations built for your grandest visions.

services.label: What We Do
services.title:
Tailored to Your
Occasion
services.subtitle: Every event has its own rhythm. We craft bespoke musical experiences that elevate the atmosphere and leave lasting impressions on your guests.
services.weddings_desc: From ceremony to reception, we set the perfect tone for every moment of your special day.
services.corporate_desc: Sophisticated entertainment for conferences, product launches, grand openings, executive events and more.
services.cocktails_desc: Smooth, ambient sets that create the perfect backdrop for networking and socializing.
services.galas_desc: Grand, show-stopping performances that match the prestige of your event.

experience.quote: “Music is the universal language that turns moments into memories.”

booking.label: Booking Inquiry
booking.title:
Reserve Your
Date
booking.subtitle: Dates for the 2026–2027 season are filling quickly. Share your vision with us and we’ll craft the perfect musical experience.
booking.travel_note: Planning an event in another city? We’d love to hear from you. Silantra travels! Just let us know your location and we’ll make it happen.
booking.ph_message: Share any details about your event!
booking.success: Thank You! We’ll Be in Touch ✦
